page: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSHighMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and is equipped with 7600.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 18.27 GB of RAM per core. The server does not include any local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is designated as Premium Storage capable for external storage attachments.

The absence of local storage and GPU accelerators represents a clear architectural tradeoff, focusing resources entirely on CPU and memory capacity. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers massive resource density, consolidating workloads that would otherwise require multiple smaller nodes. This high-density configuration reduces cluster management overhead but represents a significant infrastructure commitment suited for large-scale enterprise deployments.

Given the massive memory capacity and high core count, this server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Suitable applications include large-scale in-memory databases, massive SAP HANA deployments, heavy data warehousing, and complex enterprise resource planning systems that require substantial RAM and dedicated CPU resources without the need for local physical disks or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v3 is a high-capacity, memory-optimized server from the MSHighMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and 7600.0 GB of system memory, providing 18.27 GB of RAM per core. This configuration lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, representing a design tradeoff that prioritizes massive memory and compute density. The server is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external storage integration. Qualitatively, this server offers extreme resource density for consolidating massive enterprise workloads, reducing the need for multi-node clustering. It is suited for large-scale in-memory databases, SAP HANA, enterprise resource planning systems, and data warehousing workloads that demand substantial memory and dedicated processing power.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 7600.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for massive enterprise database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 7600.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A massive memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated processors and extensive RAM capacity for large-scale enterprise database and in-memory workloads.
bullet_points: 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
7600.0 GB of system memory providing 18.27 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
No integrated GPU accelerators or public IPv4 addresses
Designed for large-scale in-memory databases and SAP HANA
